tasks.title: Remove the while-loop 10-iteration cap
tasks.notes: P0 correctness bug. Trivial fix. Requires regression test and JS scenario test.

tasks.title: Remove redundant Context::globals HashMap
tasks.notes: P1 cleanup: low effort, removes duplicated global storage and extra clones.

tasks.title: Install String.prototype once instead of per-access closures
tasks.notes: P1 performance: low effort, high impact. Every string property access currently allocates a closure.

tasks.title: Avoid cloning array elements in builtin methods
tasks.notes: P1 performance: low effort, high impact. Array methods clone the elements vector; operate on mutable borrow instead.

tasks.title: Share function bodies via Rc<[Statement]>
tasks.notes: P0 performance: low effort, high impact. Stop cloning function bodies on every Value clone.

tasks.title: Make control flow and this explicit
tasks.notes: P1 design: medium effort, medium-high impact. Replace CONTROL_FLOW and CURRENT_THIS thread-locals with explicit enum/argument. Aligns with HIR.

tasks.title: Enforce granular unit-test policy
tasks.notes: High impact, low effort process change. Policy: one behavior, one test; tests isolated and named after the invariant; every task lists test file/name. Updated EXECUTE.md and docs/hir-design.md.

tasks.title: Add JS/TS scenario test harness
tasks.notes: High impact, medium effort. Run real JavaScript and TypeScript snippets through the runtime from Rust unit tests. Scenarios live in tests/scenarios/<category>/.

tasks.title: Runtime optimization roadmap
tasks.notes: Tracking task for the optimization review. Findings in docs/runtime-optimization-roadmap.md. Keep current as work progresses.

tasks.title: Address strict linting violations (500-line files, 40-line functions, complexity 10)
tasks.notes: High impact, high effort. Enforce the 500/40/10 linter contract on every *.rs file. cargo check lists remaining violations. Best done incrementally between other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: Very high impact, high effort. Replace recursive interpreter with heap-allocated Vec<CallFrame> and trampoline loop. Required by typed HIR.

tasks.title: Leverage Rust for runtime execution model
tasks.notes: High impact, high effort. Apply Rust ownership/explicit-stack/ecosystem patterns. Supports Task 85 and 264.

tasks.title: Implement real Promise resolution and microtasks
tasks.notes: High impact, medium effort. Replace stub Promise with real thenable queue and microtask scheduling.

tasks.title: Implement the typed HIR execution model
tasks.notes: Very high impact, very high effort. Type-aware HIR + trampoline interpreter aligned with JS/TS/JSX/TSX. Depends on Tasks 85 and quick-win cleanup.

tasks.title: Implement native ES module support for Quench apps
tasks.notes: High impact, high effort. Load and link real ES modules instead of stripping imports/exports.

tasks.title: Analyze and enable whole-suite conformance runs
tasks.notes: High impact, high effort analysis. Documented blockers: recursive interpreter stack overflow, global CURRENT_DEPTH counter, huge unsupported feature surface, baseline/harness gaps, runtime bugs.
